summary: Broad item decomp progress across 25 files, with one item TU promoted to Matching, many item functions reaching 100%, item header/type refinements, local symbol metadata corrections, and numerous small code-shape adjustments in item TUs. Bot report records +0.38% matched code, +14840 matched-code bytes, 32 new matches, and 34 unmatched-item improvements.

what_changed: Updated 25 files in the item subsystem and config metadata: 936 additions and 800 deletions.
Promoted melee/it/items/itbombhei.c to Matching in configure.py.
Adjusted item-related symbols.txt metadata: several symbols changed size/scope, several string/float symbols became local @ labels, and one data region was split into lbl_803F6A78 plus it_803F6A84.
Added AnimBundle in itCharItems.h and used it for itLinkBoomerangAttributes animation bundles.
Updated fn_80277D8C signature in both source and header to include a third u32 argument and cast assignment to HSD_MObjSetupFunc.

Made many narrow code-shape changes in item source files, including declaration ordering, temporary pointer variables, stack padding, volatile argument use, local static data, goto-selected control flow, and field/union temporary access.

Bot report recorded 32 new matches and 34 improvements in unmatched items, including new matches in itbombhei, itdosei, it_2725, it_266F, itmewtwoshadowball, itsamusmissile, itlinkbomb, itseakneedlethrown, itkyasarin, itsamusgrapple, itlinkarrow, and itnessyoyo.

smart_moves.text: Header prototype was kept in sync with the recovered fn_80277D8C body signature instead of leaving a stale two-argument declaration.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: it_2725.c fn_80277D8C now takes HSD_MObj*, u32, u32
diff_excerpt: it_2725.h prototype changed to match

smart_moves.text: Promoting itbombhei.c in configure.py was backed by bot-reported 100% .data for itbombhei and multiple new itbombhei function/section matches.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: configure.py itbombhei NonMatching -> Matching
text_corpus: bot report itbombhei .data 100% and several itbombhei new matches

smart_moves.text: The PR used metadata corrections in symbols.txt for local strings/floats and data splits rather than only forcing C source changes.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: symbols.txt global data strings/floats changed to local @ labels; it_803F6A78 split into lbl_803F6A78 and it_803F6A84

smart_moves.text: Adding a small AnimBundle type made repeated anim/matanim/shapeanim layout explicit in item attributes.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: itCharItems.h added AnimBundle with anim, matanim, shapeanim fields

decomp_lessons.lesson: When recovering callback signatures, update both the function definition and owning header prototype, and use an explicit function-pointer cast when assigning to an existing callback slot with a different typedef surface.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: fn_80277D8C signature changed to three args in .c and .h; setup assignment changed to (HSD_MObjSetupFunc) fn_80277D8C

decomp_lessons.lesson: Section and symbol metadata fixes can be part of matching item progress when local/global scope, object sizes, and split labels are wrong.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: symbols.txt changed multiple item data/string/float symbols from global to local and adjusted object sizes/splits
text_corpus: bot report matched data +864 bytes and linked data +328 bytes

decomp_lessons.lesson: Small, narrow local-codegen steering tactics appeared in this PR: pointer-to-field temporaries, declaration movement, PAD_STACK, volatile argument, cached globals, and explicit goto target for loop selection.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: it_8026CB9C item_kinds/weights pointer temporaries; it_8026E32C block-local chk2; it_8027AB64 cached Item_804A0E24 values and goto selected; it_8027B288 volatile arg1 and PAD_STACK

naming_conventions.convention: New small layout type name AnimBundle uses semantic field names anim, matanim, and shapeanim for a repeated animation resource triplet.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: typedef struct { HSD_AnimJoint* anim; HSD_MatAnimJoint* matanim; HSD_ShapeAnimJoint* shapeanim; } AnimBundle

naming_conventions.convention: Unproven/generated item function and data names remained address-style or fn_-style, while local temporaries were given role names such as item_kinds, weights, recent_y, recent_x_val, recent_y_val, and color.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: fn_80277D8C/fn_80280974 style names remain in report; local variable names item_kinds, weights, recent_y, recent_x_val, color appear in diff

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use pointer-to-field temporaries to influence generated addressing while preserving the underlying struct fields.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: it_8026CB9C assigns *(item_kinds = &spawner->x4.x4) and *(weights = &spawner->x4.xC), then writes through (*item_kinds)[cnt2] and (*weights)[cnt2]

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: For callback setup, widen the recovered function signature and cast to the callback typedef at assignment.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: it_803F1F90.setup = (HSD_MObjSetupFunc) fn_80277D8C; fn_80277D8C gains unused_arg

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use stack-shape steering only locally: PAD_STACK, volatile parameter, and explicit stack-relative pointer arithmetic appear in the recovered item routines.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: it_8027B288 volatile u32 arg1 and PAD_STACK(4); it_80278108 uses GXColor* color = (GXColor*) ((u8*) &sp1C - 4)

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Cache globals and use an explicit goto label when a loop exits to a selected case and must preserve selected/default assignment shape.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: it_8027AB64 caches Item_804A0E24.x/y, assigns *recent_y, jumps to selected, then assigns spawn.kind

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use local structs to describe previously opaque data layout when working through collision/dynamics arrays.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: itcoll.c added ItCollDynamicsDesc and ItCollDynamics

notes: Changed-file metadata is complete for the 25 files, and the bot report provides quantified match/improvement evidence.
The raw diff loaded in the prompt is truncated, so file-specific details for many item files are inferred from changed-file metadata and bot report rather than full hunks.
No inline review comments were present; reviewer intent beyond approval is not inferred.
No independent build, objdiff, or local validation was run during intake; the only validation evidence is the PR bot report.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Keep recovered callback signatures synchronized across body and header
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2533 changed fn_80277D8C from a two-argument to a three-argument function in both src/melee/it/it_2725.c and src/melee/it/it_2725.h, and cast it to HSD_MObjSetupFunc when storing it in it_803F1F90.setup. This is a graph-safe example of updating the owning header when the body proves a signature.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: fn_80277D8C definition/prototype and HSD_MObjSetupFunc cast

accepted_candidate_records.title: Narrow local codegen steering in item functions
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2533 used narrow code-shape tactics in specific item routines: pointer-to-field temporaries in it_8026CB9C, stack/volatile steering in it_8027B288, stack-relative color storage in it_80278108, and cached globals plus goto-selected flow in it_8027AB64. Treat as examples requiring local match evidence, not general style.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: it_8026CB9C, it_80278108, it_8027AB64, it_8027B288 changes
text_corpus: bot report lists several of these functions as new matches or improvements

source_update_candidates.title: Callback signature recovery should update headers and may require explicit callback typedef casts
source_update_candidates.text: When a recovered function body proves a callback has additional unused parameters or a signature shape different from the currently declared prototype, update the owning header and use an explicit typedef cast at the callback assignment if needed. PR #2533 provides a concrete example with fn_80277D8C and HSD_MObjSetupFunc.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: it_2725.c and it_2725.h fn_80277D8C signature update; setup cast
source_update_candidates.reason: This reinforces the existing truthful-headers-and-includes standard with a callback-specific example.

rejection_notes: Do not promote broad claims that volatile parameters, PAD_STACK, goto labels, or stack-relative pointer arithmetic are generally acceptable style; PR evidence only shows narrow uses with bot-reported match progress.
Do not infer author intent from the branch name claude-it or from absence of comments.
Do not mark all 25 changed files as fully matched; the bot report distinguishes 32 new matches, 34 improvements, and only configure.py explicitly promotes itbombhei.c to Matching in the loaded diff.
